meta.title: Matgari — Your Store, Your Story
meta.description: Launch your premium online store in minutes. Matgari gives you the tools to build, manage, and grow your e-commerce business with elegance.

hero.subtitle: Matgari gives independent merchants a beautifully simple platform to launch, manage, and scale their online presence — no code, no complexity, just craft.
hero.proof: Trusted by {count}+ merchants across the region

brandStrip.label: Powering stores that feel like home

features.subtitle: We obsessed over every detail so you can focus on what matters — your craft and your customers.

subdomain.title: Your Subdomain, Instantly
subdomain.desc: Get your own store.matgari.com in under two minutes. No technical setup, no hosting headaches.

products.title: Product Management
products.desc: Add products with variants, images, SEO metadata, and inventory tracking — all from a clean, intuitive dashboard.

security.title: Secure & Private
security.desc: Each store runs on its own isolated database. Your data is yours alone — always encrypted, always protected.

seo.title: Built-in SEO
seo.desc: Structured data, sitemaps, Open Graph tags, and canonical URLs generated automatically for every page.

reviews.title: Reviews & Social Proof
reviews.desc: Customers leave reviews, you moderate them. Build trust organically with genuine feedback from real buyers.

payments.title: Offline Payments
payments.desc: Accept wallet transfers and InstaPay. Customers upload receipts, you confirm — simple and trusted.

register.title: Register & Choose a Plan
register.desc: Sign up with your details, pick a plan that fits, and upload your payment receipt. We keep it human — no credit cards required.

activate.title: We Activate Your Store
activate.desc: Our team reviews your payment and activates your store within hours. You'll receive an email with your personal store link.

sell.title: Add Products & Start Selling
sell.desc: Upload your catalog, customize your store, and share it with the world. Orders flow in, notifications keep you informed.

pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Start small, grow at your pace.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: For those just beginning their journey

professional.name: Professional
professional.desc: For growing businesses ready to scale

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For established brands that demand the best

story.p1: We started Matgari because we believed every artisan, every small business, every passionate creator deserves a storefront as beautiful as their craft.
story.p2: Too many platforms drown you in complexity. We stripped away the noise and built something that feels like an extension of your workshop — warm, focused, and deeply personal.
story.p3_1: Every feature we ship is tested by real merchants. Every decision we make asks one question:
story.p3_2: Does this help someone sell what they love?

cta.title: Ready to open your doors?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of merchants who chose craft over complexity.

footer.tagline: Your store, your story. We just help you tell it beautifully.
footer.copy: Matgari. Made with intention in Egypt.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to manage your store
auth.storeNameHint: English only, no spaces (this becomes your subdomain)
auth.accountCreated: Account created! Your store is pending approval.

meta.title: Features — Matgari
meta.description: Discover all the features that make Matgari the perfect platform for your e-commerce business.

hero.subtitle: Every feature was carefully crafted to help you sell your products with ease and elegance.

products.title: Smart Product Management
products.desc: Add your products with all their details — multiple images, variants (size, color), descriptions, and SEO metadata. All from a simple, fast interface.

store.title: Your Own Store
store.desc: A unique subdomain, elegant customizable templates, and a slider to showcase your offers. Your store reflects your identity.

orders.title: Order & Shipping Management
orders.desc: Track your orders from start to finish. Update statuses, communicate with customers, and control payment and shipping methods.

marketing.title: Marketing & SEO
marketing.desc: Built-in SEO tools to appear in search results, Open Graph for shares, and Structured Data for rich results.

meta.title: About — Matgari
meta.description: Learn about Matgari's story and our mission to empower merchants.

hero.title: We believe every ambitious business deserves an online store that does it justice.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: We aim to empower shop owners and merchants to build a professional digital presence without any complexity. We believe technology should multiply your sales and simplify your operations — not get in your way.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.desc: We remove complexity so essentials shine.

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: Every detail is considered and tested.

support.title: Support
support.desc: Our team is here when you need us.

team.title: Built with love
team.desc: A team of developers and designers in Egypt, we love what we do and believe local commerce deserves world-class tools.

meta.title: Privacy Policy — Matgari
meta.description: Learn how we protect your data and respect your privacy at Matgari.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Matgari, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.

sections.title: Data We Collect
sections.body: We collect data you provide during registration (name, email, phone, store name) along with basic usage data to improve the service.

sections.title: How We Use Your Data
sections.body: We use your data to manage your account, provide the service, improve your experience, and communicate with you about account updates or our services.

sections.title: Data Protection
sections.body: We apply appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

sections.title: Data Sharing
sections.body: We don't sell your data to any third party. We may share some data with trusted service providers (like hosting services) only to operate the platform.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your data at any time. Contact us for assistance.

meta.title: Terms of Service — Matgari
meta.description: The terms and conditions for using the Matgari platform.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using the Matgari platform, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By creating an account or using the platform, you agree to comply with these terms and all applicable laws.

sections.title: Account Responsibility
sections.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

sections.title: Acceptable Content
sections.body: You agree not to use the platform to sell illegal or prohibited products. We reserve the right to terminate violating accounts.

sections.title: Subscriptions and Payments
sections.body: Subscriptions are monthly or yearly and paid in advance. You can cancel at any time from your account settings.

sections.title: Service Termination
sections.body: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend accounts that violate these terms, with the option to recover your account data.

sections.title: Modifying Terms
sections.body: We may update these terms from time to time. We'll notify you of any material changes via email.

meta.title: Refund Policy — Matgari
meta.description: Learn about our refund terms at Matgari.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: We always strive to satisfy our customers. Learn about our refund terms and conditions.

sections.title: Trial Period
sections.body: We provide a grace period at the start of subscription. If you face any issue in the early days, contact our support team and we'll help.

sections.title: Refund Cases
sections.body: A refund can be requested if there's a technical issue on our end preventing you from using the platform, or if the service doesn't match what was described.

sections.title: Yearly Subscriptions
sections.body: For yearly subscriptions, refunds are available within the first 14 days, provided the platform hasn't been fully used.

sections.title: How to Request a Refund
sections.body: Send your refund request through the contact page explaining the reason, and we'll respond within 3 business days.

sections.title: Exceptions
sections.body: Refunds are not available in cases where accounts are terminated for violations of the Terms of Service.
